data.title: How Much Lower Can SUI Drop? Traders Watch the $1.45 Support and the Critical $1.60 Breakout Level
data.description:
SUI is attempting to recover after one of the sharpest weekly drops of the year, now trading around $1. 52 as traders assess whether momentum is shifting or simply pausing. The reclaim of the $1. 45 level marks the first meaningful sign of stabilization
source: https://www.ethnews.com/how-much-lower-can-sui-drop-traders-watch-the-1-45-support-and-the-critical-1-60-breakout-level/

data.title: CME Blackout: Traders Cry “Manipulation” After 10-Hour Halt Freezes Markets
data.description:
CME has faced a rare outage after a data center cooling failure has halted Globex trading for hours, disrupting futures in equities, rates, commodities and crypto as traders have questioned single-point risks and thin Thanksgiving liquidity.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/cme-blackout-traders-cry-manipulation-after-10-hour-halt-freezes-markets/

data.title: Here’s Why Ethereum Emerges As The Global Capital Rails For On-Chain Finance
data.description:
In the rapidly evolving landscape of digital finance, Ethereum is quickly establishing itself as the primary infrastructure for global on-chain capital markets. From tokenized bonds and money market funds to institutional liquidity rails, the world’s capital is beginning to migrate to an ecosystem where transactions are programmable, auditable, and borderless. Why Is Ethereum Chosen As The Default Choice For Global Rails The global capital markets are moving on-chain to Ethereum because it is credibly neutral. ETH has never experienced downtime, and it possesses the economic security necessary to support the world’s financial system
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/ethereum/ethereum-as-global-capital-rails/

data.title: Bitcoin Price To Recover $100,000: BTIG Cites Key Reasons For Optimism
data.description:
The Bitcoin price has recently stabilized above the $90,000 mark, sparking renewed optimism among bullish investors. Analysts at BTIG have suggested that this rebound could propel Bitcoin towards its ambitious target of $100,000. Bitcoin Price Positioned For ‘Reflex Rally’ Jonathan Krinsky, an analyst at BTIG, expressed confidence that the Bitcoin price is positioned for a continued “reflex rally,” potentially reaching $100,000 in the short-term. Historical data indicates that Bitcoin typically reaches a bottom around November 26, gaining momentum as the year comes to a close
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/breaking-news-ticker/bitcoin-price-to-recover-100000-btig-cites-key-reasons-for-optimism/

data.title: Bitcoin Maxi Says ATH Back On The Table After 40x Derivatives Surge
data.description:
Bitcoin may be closing in on a new all-time high after moves in the derivatives market and fresh buying from large holders, according to market watchers and on-chain data. Related Reading: Crypto Wins Big: Thailand Moves To A 0% Tax On Local Exchange Gains Max Keiser, a long-time Bitcoin advocate, pointed to a filing by Nasdaq to increase options limits for BlackRock’s IBIT to 1 million contracts — a jump that represents roughly a 40x expansion from prior levels — as a key development that could remove barriers to bigger institutional flows. Options Market Expands Significantly According to Nasdaq paperwork and public commentary, the previous 25,000 contract cap had been seen by some as too small for rising volume. Market experts argued that earlier limits were “discriminatorily small” and suggested that 400,000 contracts would be a more reasonable baseline given current demand
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-maxi-says-ath-back-on-the-table-after-40x-derivatives-surge/

data.title: Germany’s Merz pushes EU to throttle ambitious EV pivot
data.description:
German Chancellor Friedrich Merz has called for technology-neutral regulations that may permit combustion-engine vehicles beyond the 2035 deadline in a letter sent to European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen. The chancellor reportedly stated that CO₂ regulations should consider emissions from the entire passenger car fleet rather than focusing solely on new registrations. “Our goal […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/germany-merz-pushes-eu-to-throttle-ev-pivot/

data.title: BNB Surpasses 890 USDT with a Narrowed 0.84% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Nov 28, 2025, 20:50 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 890 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 890.140015 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.84% decrease in 24 hours.
